name: W.R. Berkley Corporation 4.25% Subordinated Debentures due 2060
summary: W.R. Berkley Corporation 4.25% Subordinated Debentures due 2060 represents a debt instrument issued by W.R. Berkley Corporation. These are subordinated debentures, meaning they have a lower priority than other debt in the event of bankruptcy, and they mature in 2060. The debentures pay a fixed interest rate of 4.25%.
